creator: blaz@amis.net
text:
This patch updates postfix port to first non-beta release (20010228).
Includes all goodies from postfix-current port (menu selection of additional
features, TLS support, IPv6 support).

Adds the following files in postfix/files subdirectory
(don't forget to cvs add):

patch-ad
patch-ae
patch-ag
patch-bl
patch-cc
patch-cf
patch-da
patch-db
patch-dc
patch-dd
patch-de
patch-df
patch-dg
patch-ei
patch-ej
patch-lmtp.h
